data.title: 国际服主线Vol.3 第二章后篇更新
data.summary: [Update Preview] Sensei, the second half of Main Story Vol.3 Eden Treaty Ch.2, Paradise Paradox will
data.body:
[Update Preview]

Sensei, the second half of Main Story Vol.3 Eden Treaty Ch.2, Paradise Paradox will be released on 5/31 (Tue).
We're all crossing our fingers the Make-Up Work Club can safely pass their final exam!
